descriptions: Inspect the 29-step RAG pipeline powered by CoreML and Apple Foundation Models.
Orchestrate your documents with a transparent, local-first RRF hybrid search pipeline.
Instantly cross-examine thousands of secure documents without an internet connection.
No remote wrappers. Secure Apple Foundation Models & Private Cloud Compute routing.

long_headlines.text: Zero-retention document intelligence that halts speculative answers if facts are missing.
Bypass on-device token limits with multi-step RAPTOR summarization and Metal-driven RRF.
Inspect model routes, TOPS, and active memory trace live on the Silicon Telemetry HUD.
Leverage WWDC 2026 native APIs for zero-retention, hardware-accelerated document search.
Orchestrate secure documents via local Apple Intelligence and Private Cloud Compute.

descriptions.text: A local RAG engine built to halt speculative answers. If a fact is missing, it abstains.
Bypass Apple Intelligence token limits. Ingest vast libraries with SIMD4 vector search.
No remote wrappers. Secure Apple Foundation Models & Private Cloud Compute routing.
Inspect the 29-step RAG pipeline trace showing active routes and exact citation origins.
Fuses BM25 matching with vector similarity via Metal compute shaders for 4x faster RAG.
